rule_metadata.author: Samir Bousseaden, @neu5ron
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions - Zeek

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions - Zeek
id: 286b47ed-f6fe-40b3-b3a8-35129acd43bc
related:
- id: 91c945bc-2ad1-4799-a591-4d00198a1215
  type: derived
status: test
description: Detects known sensitive file extensions via Zeek
references:
- Internal Research
author: Samir Bousseaden, @neu5ron
date: 2020-04-02
modified: 2025-10-17
tags:
- attack.collection
logsource:
  product: zeek
  service: smb_files
detection:
  selection:
    name|endswith:
    - .pst
    - .ost
    - .msg
    - .nst
    - .oab
    - .edb
    - .nsf
    - .bak
    - .dmp
    - .kirbi
    - .rdp
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Help Desk operator doing backup or re-imaging end user machine or backup software
- Users working with these data types or exchanging message files
level: medium
